Container.Name: kitchinv
Container.Overview: Home kitchen inventory manager. Photograph your fridge, freezer, and pantry — kitchinv extracts a searchable food inventory from each photo using a vision AI model.
Container.Description: Home kitchen inventory manager. Photograph your fridge, freezer, and pantry — kitchinv extracts a searchable food inventory from each photo using a vision AI model.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the kitchinv web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and uploaded photos.

Config.Name: Secrets
Config.Description: Directory containing API key files (e.g. gemini_key). See README for setup instructions.

Config.Name: VISION_BACKEND
Config.Description: Vision provider: gemini, claude, or ollama.

Config.Name: GEMINI_API_KEY_FILE
Config.Description: Path to file containing your Google AI API key. Create with: echo -n 'YOUR_KEY' > /mnt/user/appdata/kitchinv/secrets/gemini_key && chmod 600 /mnt/user/appdata/kitchinv/secrets/gemini_key

Config.Name: GEMINI_MODEL
Config.Description: Gemini model to use. The prompt is tuned for gemini-2.5-flash.

Config.Name: CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE
Config.Description: Path to file containing your Anthropic API key. Only needed if VISION_BACKEND=claude.

Config.Name: CLAUDE_MODEL
Config.Description: Claude model to use. Only needed if VISION_BACKEND=claude.

Config.Name: LISTEN_ADDR
Config.Description: HTTP listen address inside the container.
